subject: Warp crash when switch to Fourier Space Tab
body:
Hi everyone,
I got a Warp crash when I just open my project and switch to Fourier Space 
tab. The error message is as follow:

[image: warp_crash_fourier_tab.png]


Btw, when I try process my data without using particles picking function. I 
got deselected all of my data files. How can I process my data properly? 

Thanks for any help!

Sincerely,
